description: The Dixie Mafia is a loosely connected criminal organization originally based in Biloxi, Mississippi, operating primarily in the Southern United States from the 1960s onward. It engaged in burglary, theft, robbery, drug trafficking, contract killings, and blackmail. Unlike the American Mafia, members were not connected by family or ethnicity but by a common goal of profit. The group is now a general term for independent White Southern criminal networks.
